svg.title: Use Lerim from any agent
svg.desc: Animated SVG showing agents and IDEs asking Lerim through CLI, skill, or MCP, then receiving source-backed context retrieved from the context graph.

g.text: Agents and IDEs ask through CLI, skill, or MCP and receive source-backed context before they work.
Retrieval path: agents get context back from Lerim.
AGENT ASKS · LERIM RETRIEVES · CONTEXT RETURNS TO THE SAME WORKFLOW
